claims.text: NeuralKit has reached $50K in monthly recurring revenue.
claims.source_span: We have reached $50K in monthly recurring revenue.

claims.text: The company targets AI infrastructure teams.
claims.source_span: Our initial customers are AI infrastructure teams.

founder.rationale: The synthetic evidence shows consistent technical shipping, while the evidence base remains thin.

market.rationale: Synthetic market evidence indicates growing demand for AI infrastructure tooling.

idea_vs_market.rationale: The product addresses a documented workflow need, subject to traction verification.

claims.note: A synthetic HN-style signal says the company was pre-revenue three weeks earlier.
Two resolved synthetic signals support demand from AI infrastructure teams.

sections.snapshot: NeuralKit (Synthetic) is an AI infrastructure opportunity with a technically credible founder and disputed traction.
sections.hypotheses: The investable hypothesis is that infrastructure demand can support early design partnerships despite unverified revenue quality.
sections.swot: Strength: technical shipping. Weakness: contradicted revenue claim. Opportunity: expanding observability spend. Threat: open-source alternatives.
sections.problem_product: The product targets operational friction in model observability workflows.
sections.traction_kpis: The $50K MRR claim is contradicted. No verified revenue KPI is committed in this memo.

recommendation.rationale: Proceed only on the supported market thesis and founder execution evidence, with the traction contradiction explicitly preserved for human review.

objections.text: A fast-growing open-source alternative may compress willingness to pay in the target market.
objections.label: evidence-backed

objections.text: The revenue contradiction may indicate a broader pattern of unreliable reporting.
objections.label: speculation

decision_brief.summary: Decision Brief: 1 red, 0 yellow, 1 dim contested pairs; human review required.

evidence.text: Synthetic HN-style evidence: the founder said NeuralKit was pre-revenue.
Synthetic market note: infrastructure teams are increasing spend on model observability.
Synthetic customer note: an AI infrastructure team reported the workflow as a priority.
Synthetic repository signal: a comparable open-source tool is gaining adoption.
